# Phase 10.0.30 Knowledge Evolution Plan

Phase: 10.0.30 - Constitutional Knowledge Evolution, Interpretive Pluralism & Non-Dogmatic Governance Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only handoff note. Runtime remains disabled.

## Scope

Add governance-only doctrine for constitutional knowledge evolution, interpretive pluralism, anti-dogmatic governance, institutional learning continuity, bounded reinterpretation, adaptive constitutional understanding, epistemic humility, anti-rigidity, reinterpretation safeguards, civilization learning survivability, non-fragmenting knowledge evolution, interpretive continuity, and the phase summary.

## Repository State

Repository classification remains UNSTABLE because unrelated runtime/app drift, generated Prisma artifacts, many untracked paths, and branch-ahead divergence are present. This plan does not clean, revert, stage, commit, repair, reinterpret, rewrite, generate ideology, verify, arbitrate, or mutate those changes.
